translations.en: I’m looking for my future apartment.
translations.it: Sto cercando il mio futuro appartamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找以后要住的公寓。
translations.yue: 我而家搵緊之後要住嘅單位。
translations.he: אני מחפש את הדירה העתידית שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm căn hộ sẽ ở sau này.
translations.nl: Ik ben op zoek naar mijn toekomstige appartement.
translations.hi: मैं अपने भविष्य के अपार्टमेंट की तलाश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter min fremtidige leilighet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari apartemen untuk ditinggali nanti.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter min framtida lägenhet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min fremtidige lejlighed.
translations.ja: 将来住むアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies the noun 'appart'.
Adjective modifying 'appart', denoting something prospective.
Common noun (colloquial abbreviation of 'appartement'), masculine; direct object of 'cherche'.

sentences.target: Ton futur boulot te plaît déjà.

translations.fr: Ton futur boulot te plaît déjà.
translations.en: You already like your future job.
translations.es: Ya te gusta tu futuro trabajo.
translations.de: Dein zukünftiger Job gefällt dir schon.
translations.it: Ti piace già il tuo futuro lavoro.
translations.ko: 앞으로 할 일이 벌써 마음에 들어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你已经喜欢上你未来的工作了。
translations.yue: 你已經鍾意你將來嘅工啦。
translations.ru: Тебе уже нравится твоя будущая работа.
translations.pt: Você já gosta do seu futuro trabalho.
translations.he: אתה כבר אוהב את העבודה העתידית שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đã thích công việc sắp tới rồi.
translations.nl: Je vindt je toekomstige baan nu al leuk.
translations.uk: Тобі вже подобається твоя майбутня робота.
translations.hu: Már most tetszik a jövőbeli munkád.
translations.hi: तुम्हें अपनी आने वाली नौकरी पहले से ही पसंद है.
translations.pl: Już podoba ci się twoja przyszła praca.
translations.el: Σου αρέσει ήδη η μελλοντική σου δουλειά.
translations.nb: Du liker allerede den kommende jobben din.
translations.id: Kamu sudah menyukai pekerjaan masa depanmu.
translations.sv: Du gillar redan ditt framtida jobb.
translations.ro: Îți place deja viitorul tău job.
translations.cs: Už se ti líbí tvoje budoucí práce.
translations.da: Du kan allerede lide dit fremtidige job.
translations.ja: あなたはもう将来の仕事が気に入っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'boulot'.
Adjective modifying 'boulot', indicating something prospective.
Common noun (colloquial), masculine; grammatical subject of 'plaît' in the construction 'X plaît à Y'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object (dative) with 'plaire' ('plaît à toi').
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with subject 'boulot' and takes an indirect object.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating precedence.

translations.de: Wir bereiten unsere nächste Reise vor.
translations.it: Stiamo preparando il nostro prossimo viaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在准备下一次旅行。
translations.yue: 我哋而家喺度準備下一次旅行。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi sắp tới của mình.
translations.nl: We zijn onze volgende reis aan het voorbereiden.
translations.hi: हम अपनी अगली यात्रा की तैयारी कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ετοιμαζόμαστε για το επόμενο ταξίδι μας.
translations.id: Kami sedang mempersiapkan perjalanan kami berikutnya.
translations.ro: Ne pregătim pentru următoarea noastră călătorie.
translations.ja: 私たちは次の旅行の準備をしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/colloquial 'we'), treated as 3rd person singular; subject of 'prépare'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); transitive, selecting a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, singular form; modifies 'voyage'.
Adjective modifying 'voyage', denoting something upcoming.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'prépare'.

translations.en: They’re talking about the future move.
translations.es: Están hablando de la próxima mudanza.
translations.de: Sie sprechen über den bevorstehenden Umzug.
translations.ko: 그들은 앞으로 있을 이사에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在讨论即将到来的搬家。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度討論即將到嚟嘅搬屋。
translations.pt: Eles estão falando sobre a mudança que se aproxima.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về việc chuyển nhà sắp tới.
translations.nl: Ze praten over de aanstaande verhuizing.
translations.hi: वे आने वाले घर बदलने के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: De snakker om den kommende flyttingen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang membicarakan kepindahan yang akan datang.
translations.sv: De pratar om den kommande flytten.
translations.ro: Ei vorbesc despre mutarea care urmează.
translations.da: De taler om den kommende flytning.
translations.ja: 彼らは今度の引っ越しについて話している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of 'discutent'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes a prepositional complement with 'de'.
Fused form of the preposition 'de' + definite article 'le'; introduces the nominal complement.
Adjective modifying 'déménagement', indicating that it is upcoming.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'du'.

jp: Ton futur boulot te plaît déjà.
fr: Ton futur boulot te plaît déjà.
en: I’m looking for my future apartment.
You already like your future job.
They’re talking about the future move.
